parameters.subject: Your Offboarding Details — Last Day: {{ $json.lastDay }}
parameters.message:
Offboarding Confirmation

Dear {{ $json.fullName }},

We've initiated your offboarding process. Here's a summary of what to expect:

📋 Offboarding Checklist

  • ☐ Complete knowledge transfer documentation
  • ☐ Return company equipment (laptop, badge, keys)
  • ☐ Wrap up outstanding projects and hand off to team
  • ☐ Complete exit interview with HR
  • ☐ Update passwords and transfer account ownership
  • ☐ Verify final paycheck details with Payroll
  • ☐ Review non-disclosure/non-compete agreements
  • ☐ Update LinkedIn and professional profiles

Last Day: {{ $json.lastDay }}

Department: {{ $json.department }}

We genuinely appreciate your contributions and wish you all the best in your next chapter.

Warm regards,
HR Team

parameters.subject: Action Required: {{ $json.fullName }} Offboarding — Last Day {{ $json.lastDayIso }}
parameters.message:
⚠️ Offboarding Notice — Manager Action Required

Hi,

{{ $json.fullName }} from your team has initiated offboarding.

Last Day: {{ $json.lastDay }}

Manager Checklist

  • ☐ Schedule 1:1 transition meetings
  • ☐ Identify and reassign open projects/tasks
  • ☐ Arrange knowledge transfer sessions
  • ☐ Request access revocation from IT by last day
  • ☐ Complete manager portion of exit interview
  • ☐ Update team org chart and documentation
  • ☐ Post backfill requisition (if replacing)

Please coordinate with HR (hr@company.com) for any questions.

text.text:
✅ Employee notified via email
✅ Manager notified
✅ GSuite account flagged for offboarding
⏳ IT ticket: Manual action required
⏳ Payroll: Manual action required

parameters.responseBody: ={ "success": true, "message": "Offboarding initiated for {{ $('Code - Parse Offboarding Form').item.json.fullName }}" }

meta.description: HR submits offboarding form → simultaneously emails employee checklist, emails manager action items, flags GSuite account for deactivation on last day, and posts summary to HR Ops Slack channel.
prerequisites: GSuite Admin SDK OAuth2 (Directory API scope)
Slack Bot Token with chat:write scope
GSuite Admin API: enable in Google Cloud Console
Add error handling for GSuite if Admin SDK not configured
